name: Strait Network Policy
description: Routes all outbound TCP inside the container through a Cedar-policy-gated MITM proxy. iptables REDIRECT forwards traffic from the configured agent user to the in-container proxy; no HTTPS_PROXY dependency.

host.description: Path inside the container where the host control plane Unix socket is mounted.

agent_user.description: Unix user the entrypoint drops privileges to before exec'ing the user's command. Must already exist in the base image (common-utils installs the default 'vscode' user).

policy.description: Path inside the container to the Cedar policy file.

proxy_port.description: TCP port the in-container MITM proxy listens on. iptables REDIRECT rewrites ports 80 and 443 to this port.
